channel.title: +Phenes on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Phenes on Vishvas's notes

item.title: +Feeding
item.description: Plant cells have organelles called platelets which enable photosynthesis of food. Predation Catching food Predators may be mostly static, lying in wait for prey to come to them. Or, they may actively move and entrap or chase down food. Baiting Predators may attract food organisms to a certain location for entrapment. Eg: brightly colored flowers of the venus fly trap, the attractive tail of the rattle-snake. Overcoming a single prey A prey is usually overcome using asphyxiation, bleeding, cutting, crushing or poison.
